description_long: This object is a stylized Christmas tree, constructed with intersecting flat panels arranged in a star-like pattern, forming a geometric enclosure around a central vertical trunk. The panels are dark, glossy, and angular, with subtle reflections and hints of foliage visible through the gaps and on the surfaces. Sparse green branches and leaves are visible within the structure, suggesting a minimalistic or abstract representation of a traditional Christmas tree. The overall form is tall and narrow, with the panels extending outward at the base and tapering toward the top. There are no visible decorative ornaments, string lights, or a tree topper present. The design is modern and sculptural, likely intended as a contemporary urban holiday decoration.
description: A modern, geometric Christmas tree with intersecting glossy black panels and sparse green foliage inside, forming a tall, angular structure. No visible ornaments, lights, or topper are present.
description_view_0: Front view shows the intersecting black panels forming a star-like enclosure with green foliage visible through the center.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the angular, layered arrangement of the panels and a partial glimpse of the foliage within.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, with the geometric panel structure and sparse foliage visible through the central axis.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the overlapping panels and the vertical alignment of the foliage inside.
